deductions.reason: Across all three transcripts, the tutor never explicitly explains why it is withholding direct answers or why the guided-discovery approach supports the student's learning. It enforces constraints (e.g., 'I'm not going to fill the row for you') but never articulates the pedagogical rationale (e.g., active reasoning, retention, skill development).

In Transcript 3, after the student produces a usable table row (Turn 10) following several failed or vague attempts, the tutor moves directly to pushing the student toward the next stressor without prompting any reflection on what changed or why the approach worked. Similar missed opportunities appear in Transcripts 1 and 2 when students make progress.

grade.overview: The tutor performs strongly across all three transcripts: it consistently avoids doing the assignment for the student, uses Socratic questioning effectively, scaffolds well from broad confusion to specific table rows, and maintains appropriate tone and assignment anchoring. The primary weaknesses are the absence of any explicit rationale for the tutoring approach (1.3.A) and a missed opportunity to prompt reflection after student improvement (1.3.C). No deductions were warranted for direct answer-giving, editing, or dialogue quality issues.
grade.judge_reasoning: 1.1: The tutor never gives submission-ready content, never rewrites student text, and consistently keeps key idea generation student-led by asking targeted questions before offering frameworks. Full marks. 1.2: The tutor builds on student progress (e.g., affirming 'infrastructure + social' before pushing deeper) and diagnoses confusion before responding with new scaffolding. Full marks. 1.3: The tutor never explains why it withholds direct answers or why guided discovery benefits the student (1.3.A.a deduction). After the student produces a usable row in Transcript 3 Turn 10, the tutor moves on without prompting reflection on what changed (1.3.C.a deduction). 1.3.B is borderline—the tutor does give process-level feedback (e.g., 'your justification is still too broad, add one Jakarta-specific detail')—so no deduction there. Dialogue quality and communication quality are strong throughout: responses are concise, well-structured, on-topic, and supportive without being evaluative.
